top3.sql:
SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name
FROM member m
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
GROUP BY m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name
ORDER BY SUM(i.amount) DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS full_name
FROM member m
JOIN (
    SELECT link_to_member, SUM(cost) AS total_spent
    FROM expense
    GROUP BY link_to_member
) e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
ORDER BY e.total_spent DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name
FROM member m
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
GROUP BY m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name
ORDER BY SUM(i.amount) DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS full_name
FROM member m
JOIN (
    SELECT link_to_member, SUM(cost) AS total_spent
    FROM expense
    GROUP BY link_to_member
) e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
ORDER BY e.total_spent DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE e.approved = 1
GROUP BY m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name
ORDER BY SUM(e.cost) DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name
FROM member m
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
GROUP BY m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name
ORDER BY SUM(i.amount) DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS full_name
FROM member m
JOIN (
    SELECT link_to_member, SUM(cost) AS total_spent
    FROM expense
    GROUP BY link_to_member
) e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
ORDER BY e.total_spent DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE e.approved = 1
GROUP BY m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name
ORDER BY SUM(e.cost) DESC
LIMIT 5;

final.sql:
SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name
FROM member m
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
GROUP BY m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name
ORDER BY SUM(i.amount) DESC
LIMIT 5;
